ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beverages" (
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beverage */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category (Foreign Key) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type (Foreign Key) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand (Foreign Key) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size (Foreign Key) */,
  "warehouse_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the beverage in the warehouse */,
  "alc_percentage" REAL /* Alcohol percentage of the beverage */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Vintage year of the beverage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beverage */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beverage image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., IMFL, OS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Wine, Whisky) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the brand */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 750 ml, 1 liter) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the beverage in milliliters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse in terms of stock */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_stock" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beverage */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beverage in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_stock_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_stock_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beverage sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beverage sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beverage ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beverage ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse handling the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, clerk, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

Name of the type (e.g., Wine, Whisky)
